purpose: Convert robe and long garment reference images into clean headless and handless male T-pose modular robe renders with hidden feet, capped ground-length bottoms, and contact shadows for image-to-3D workflows.

referenceImages.description: Authoritative male upper-body T-pose, arm length, width, cutoff, and framing template.

front.label: Male Robe Front
front.description: Front-facing technical modular robe render using the locked male upper-body silhouette.

back.label: Male Robe Back
back.description: Direct rear view continuing the same capped-bottom robe from the approved front view.
